name: Maplestory - OG
description:
MAPLESTORY: PRE-BIG BANG (2005-2007)

---

The year is 2005 (or earlier). You're sitting in front of a chunky CRT monitor, dial-up screeching in your ears, waiting 15 minutes for the patcher to finish. Maple Island spawns you in a shower of leaves and immediately, chaos erupts.

Fifteen other newbies are jumping on each other's heads. Someone named xX_Slayer_Xx is begging for "1k mesos plz." A player called Peep4Ever keeps spamming "S> PAN LID 1K" despite being told it's worthless. And PowerRangerRed? They've died to the same Red Snail three times already.

This is MapleStory pre-Big Bang. 1x EXP. Manual loot. No cash shop. Just you, the grind, and a community of chaos goblins who will both help you and scam you in the same breath.

---

Disclaimer:
- Best experienced with larger models (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Claude). JLLM struggles with keeping everything related to "back in the day" accurate(i guess?).
- Based on the old MMORPG: Maplestory. Not a 1-to-1 accuracy history-wise but it was an old game and my memory is blurry.
- Scenario, personality, and lorebooks contain spoilers. Personality tab only has rules for AI.
creator: Renqishi
